overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a walk along a modern city sidewalk with distinctive red overhead structural beams. The player encounters a pedestrian, approaches an overpass intersection with a traffic light, and continues through a sunken roadway area with a massive glass skyscraper visible throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the distant skyscraper

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket and green pants walking toward camera then passing by on the right

massive modern glass skyscraper with multiple floors visible in the distance
wide concrete sidewalk with tile pattern

mature trees in large concrete planters
large rectangular concrete planters containing trees and shrubs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with distinctive red structural beams overhead and a massive glass tower visible in the distance. The camera walks forward past a pedestrian in a brown jacket who approaches from the opposite direction. Green railings line the left side of the path while trees in concrete planters line the right, creating a structured urban corridor.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the overpass intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red then changing to green
elevated concrete roadway with chain link fencing on sides

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the sidewalk as the environment opens up approaching an intersection. A traffic light comes into view and changes from red to green. The concrete overpass becomes visible in the distance, and the green railings and planters from the previous segment fall behind as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: under the overpass with view of skyscraper above

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tall glass tower against the bright sky
camera pans to show the underside of the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the skyscraper and around the overpass structure while continuing forward

entered.detail: metal safety fencing along the overpass edge
modern street lamp with dual fixtures

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the concrete overpass, entering a semi-covered area with mixed lighting. The camera tilts upward to admire the tall glass tower framed against the sky, then pans to show the underside of the overpass structure. The environment becomes devoid of pedestrians as the camera moves through this transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken roadway with concrete retaining walls

events.description: transition from sidewalk level down to sunken roadway

agents.ego_description: walking along the lower street level between concrete retaining walls

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti on the left side of the sunken road

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk down to a sunken roadway level, flanked by a tall concrete retaining wall with graffiti on the left. The red structural beams remain visible overhead but from a new perspective below. The camera continues forward through this enclosed corridor with street lamps lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from a structured sidewalk into a sunken roadway. It begins by moving past a pedestrian beneath distinctive red structural beams, flanked by green railings and concrete planters with a massive glass tower looming in the distance. As the camera advances, the environment opens up toward an intersection where a traffic light shifts from red to green, leaving the planters behind. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under a concrete overpass, tilting upward to frame the glass tower against the sky before panning across the underside of the structure. Finally, the perspective descends to a sunken roadway level, moving along a graffiti-covered retaining wall and street lamps while the red beams remain visible from a new vantage point below.
